channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Intel to repurchase Apollo’s stake in Ireland fab for $14.2B
item.description: Two years after selling a stake in its Irish chip manufacturing facility, Intel Corp. today announced plans to buy back the shares for $14.2 billion. The company intends to finance the transaction with a combination of cash and stock. Intel operates a plant c… [Intel]

item.title: Companies Balance AI Opportunities With Fear of AI Bubble
item.description: After Microsoft paused some development of data centers in spring 2025, the company was surprised to see the demand for artificial intelligence services race past its ability to provide them, Bloomberg reported Wednesday (April 1). At the time Microsoft made … [Microsoft, Intel]

item.title: Oracle’s ruthless AI gamble: Mass layoffs amid data breaches and mounting debt
item.description: Oracle abruptly terminated 20,000–30,000 employees (18% of its workforce) with a 6 a.m. email, immediately revoking access—highlighting corporate callousness. Despite 95% net income surge, Oracle faces $124B debt, negative $10B cash flow and a $300B OpenAI “S… [Oracle, OpenAI]

item.title: India news: Thousands affected as Oracle cuts jobs globally, say reports
item.description: Up to 12,000 workers in India could reportedly be affected as the tech giant cuts jobs globally while boosting AI investment. DW has the latest. [Oracle]

item.title: What’s driving Oracle’s latest job cuts?
item.description: Thousands of job losses have been reported, affecting many roles at Oracle Cloud Infrastructure including software engineering and product compliance [Oracle]

item.title: Oracle’s layoffs signal deepening AI threat for software firms and employees
item.description: Mint learns that about 12,000-15,000 of Oracle’s layoffs will be in India, which has a total of 30,000 employees, according to at least four people with knowledge of the matter. [Oracle]

item.title: Elon Musk Nears Trillionaire Status as SpaceX Files for Massive IPO Valued at $1.75 Trillion
item.description: Elon Musk, already the world's richest person with a net worth exceeding $820 billion as of early April 2026, could soon become the first individual in history to surpass $1 trillion in personal wealth if SpaceX completes a blockbuster initial public offering…

item.title: Record-Breaking Black Tech COFE+ Intelligent Coffee Robot Sold in 65 Countries
item.description: Shanghai Hi-Dolphin’s COFE+ robot barista now serves 65+ countries: 2.35㎡, 10+ year lifespan, AI craft, 90% lower costs. The Light Store Era has arrived.... [Intel, ServiceNow]

item.title: Private Equity Sales Slump as AI, War Bring New Stress Fractures
item.description: Private equity sales have fallen by more than a third this year, as developments in artificial intelligence and war in Iran heap pressure on a subdued exit market. [Intel]

item.title: Pruning The Mediavine; Shoppers Aren’t Clicking Amazon’s AI Ads
item.description: Mediavine suffers layoffs; Amazon’s chatbot ads suffer from lack of clicks; and we all suffer the AI fruit slop. The post Pruning The Mediavine; Shoppers Aren’t Clicking Amazon’s AI Ads appeared first on AdExchanger. [Amazon, Nvidia]

item.title: Oracle’s AI pivot cuts deep, lays off 20% of its India workforce
item.description: Oracle has cut around 10,000 jobs in India, sources told ET. This is part of a global restructuring affecting 30,000 employees. The company is reducing roles in its tech divisions. Oracle Financial Software Services also saw job losses. Employees are concerne… [Oracle]

item.title: FY27 Outlook: Geopolitical pressure and AI disruption set to reshape India Inc
item.description: Corporate India faces heightened uncertainty entering fiscal year 2026-27 due to geopolitical tensions and AI disruption. Sectors like banking anticipate gradual NIM recovery, while FMCG expects better earnings visibility. The IT sector grapples with AI conce… [Apple]

item.title: Alphabet: 8-K
item.description: Official SEC 8-K filing from Alphabet on 2026-04-02. 8-K [Alphabet]
